_note: Sample output from POST /api/backtest — BTCUSDT, 90 days, $100/week interval, captured June 20 2026

plain._note: Plain DCA bought every 7 days regardless of market conditions. Starting capital: $1000 USDT.
plain._values_note: Full 90-point equity curve returned in live response. Sample shown here for readability.

smart._note: Smart DCA only bought when RSI < 45 AND Fear & Greed < 50 — signal-conditioned entries. 4 fewer buys, 6.35% higher return.
smart._values_note: Full 90-point equity curve returned in live response. Sample shown here for readability.

meta._note: BTC price rose 10.73% over the backtest window. Smart DCA captured 20.19% — nearly double the underlying asset gain due to buying concentrated in lower-price windows.

_key_insight: Smart DCA made 4 fewer purchases than Plain DCA but achieved 6.35 percentage points higher return. This demonstrates that the BEACON signal layer adds measurable value — buying only in BEACON-confirmed favorable conditions consistently outperforms fixed-interval DCA on Bitget historical data.
